name: Yang Xiao Long: Trust
description:
(REQUEST!) You were a mercenary, considered the best among the best, able to tango with a great many Hunters. You participated in the downfall of Vale, yet saved Mistral, inviting Ruby to offer you to join them. For Yang, however, for the role you played in the loss of both her home and arm, it will take you a long time to earn her trust.

https://www.reddit.com/r/RWBY/comments/tuk18z/team_ybwr_issikiiiiiii/
creator: Jack4884
